sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 25:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Terminology 25:1
items.html: When the male and female receive illumination from each other, it is called “Generality.” There are three kinds of Generality: When they are without vessels, meaning when they ascend to Malchut of the Rosh, when they are in two vessels, which is in AB, and when they are in one vessel, which is in SAG. (See “Incorporation”)
